location: Rare drop from a Giant Oracle Envoy found on the upper tree branches of Miquella's Haligtree; from the Haligtree Canopy Site of Grace, head up and along the branches past the smaller Oracle Envoys to reach it.
tactics: The route is narrow branch platforming with real fall-damage/fall-off risk — take it slow
Drop rate is low, so expect to farm: kill the Giant Oracle Envoy, rest at Haligtree Canopy, and repeat; a Discovery-boosting talisman speeds this up
Don't mistake the smaller, regular-sized Oracle Envoys nearby for the source — only the lone Giant Oracle Envoy carries the horn
lore: A huge golden horn carried by the Oracle Envoys, so heavy that no ordinary person could lift it, let alone sound it as the instrument it was originally meant to be.

builds.name: Strength/Faith holy build
builds.why: Innate holy damage and D-scaling Faith let it double as a melee weapon for a faith-leaning strength build.

builds.name: Ranged holy option
builds.why: The built-in Great Oracular Bubble skill launches a slow-tracking holy projectile, giving a Faith build a colossal weapon with genuine ranged utility.
